strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) at re:cinq
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective and creator of multiple open-source tools/libraries
concerns: No demonstrated Principal/Director-level IC scope; titles cap at Senior/Staff with small-team contexts
Limited evidence of cloud-scale AI platform strategy or advising strategic customers/partners
No advanced degree in AI and no recognized AI products/platforms at the scale implied by the role

key_factors.factor: Years of engineering experience and breadth

response.justification: The candidate brings 15+ years of versatile full-stack and infrastructure engineering, founder experience, and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling, which aligns directionally with the role's AI focus. However, the resume lacks evidence of Principal/Director-level IC scope, recognized AI products or platforms, and strategic advisory experience with cloud/AI customers, which are central to this position.
